mnemonics.title: Logistic = Classification
mnemonics.content: Despite having 'regression' in the name, logistic regression is a CLASSification algorithm. It outputs probabilities using the sigmoid.

mnemonics.title: Sigmoid Squashes
mnemonics.content: Sigmoid squashes any real number to (0,1). Input -inf -> 0, Input 0 -> 0.5, Input +inf -> 1. It is the probability converter.

mnemonics.title: Log-Loss not MSE
mnemonics.content: MSE + Sigmoid = non-convex (bad). Log-loss + Sigmoid = convex (good). Always use log-loss for logistic regression.

mnemonics.title: Odds Ratio Interpretation
mnemonics.content: Coefficient b: e^b = odds multiplier. b=0.7: odds multiply by e^0.7 ≈ 2. b=0: no effect. b<0: odds decrease.

mnemonics.title: Soft for Many
mnemonics.content: Sigmoid for 2 classes. Softmax for Many classes. Both output probabilities. Softmax sums to 1 across all classes.
